reason: Domain value type (CellReplacement) lives under domain/entities; data renderer in data/renderers; widget under presentation/widgets — keep layering clean.
Per-cell Map state shape, copyWith immutability, and reset-on-type-change semantics follow Riverpod Notifier patterns.
CellOverlay generalization — gesture handling, hit-test transparency, Semantics labels for a11y per MD3.
Riverpod provider patterns for the new per-cell controller interfaces (pickCellImage / setCellScale / etc).
